All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

B

BatchFileWorker - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers
Created by a BatchWorker, applies the whole workflow to a specific input file, returns the corresponding ResultsTable after doing the particle analysis on the file.
BatchFileWorker(LDCService, File, File) - Constructor for class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.BatchFileWorker
Creates a worker applying the workflow on the given inputFile.
BatchWindow - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.rightpanel
A batch mode window, offering to the user the possibility of processing a whole given directory with the current analysis settings.
BatchWindow(Context, MainGUI_LDC) - Constructor for class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.rightpanel.BatchWindow
 
BatchWorker - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers
Manages the creation of sub-workers (BatchFileWorker), for processing the files from a given output directory.
Ends by merging results and exporting them to a newly created global '.csv'.
BatchWorker(LDCService, File, File, BatchWindow) - Constructor for class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.BatchWorker
Creates a BatchWorker.
binaryImg - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.MeasuresProcessingWorker
 
buildStackFromSlices(Set<Integer>, ImageStack) - Static method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.utils.InputUtils
Builds a new ImageStack containing the specified 1-based slice indices.
bw - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.BatchWorker
The batch window, if existing.
